title: cynometra citrina
intro: Cynometra citrina, also known as the yellow garcinia or yellow mangosteen, is a plant species belonging to the family Cynometra. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various medicinal practices, attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cynometra citrina include its potential in managing diabetes, reducing cholesterol levels, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues such as constipation and diarrhea. In herbal preparations, the plant's parts are often used to create teas, infusions, and extracts, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
